spec.name: Cushioncone 2
spec.summary: Creates a brief, localized cushion of force that gently slows the impact of an object, preventing it from causing damage upon contact.
spec.effect_description: Creates a brief, localized cushion of force that gently slows the impact of an object, preventing it from causing damage upon contact. A square dampen/create recipe that channels force discipline into kinetic output. It applies a cone pattern against object across self reach with immediate persistence.
